name: Skills fall back to file tools when both CLI and MCP are unavailable
query: Neither Obsidian CLI nor MCP server is available. Run /llm-wiki:wiki-query "What deployment patterns do we use?" using the wiki at /tmp/test-vault with a pre-populated schema.
expected_behavior: The skill uses Grep, Glob, and Read to search and read vault files directly
The user-facing report notes the fallback
success_criteria: Output mentions using file tools as fallback
The query uses Grep or Glob to search the vault
The query uses Read to read matching notes
A synthesized answer is still produced
